# Brand Style Generator

> Free web app to design complete brand identities in minutes. No design skills required.

## What It Does

Brand Style Generator helps anyone create a professional brand identity:

- **Color Palette Generation** — OKLCH-based palettes with automatic light/dark modes and WCAG accessibility checks
- **Font Pairing** — Curated Google Fonts combinations that work well together
- **Tone of Voice** — Select brand personality (professional, friendly, bold, etc.)
- **Live Preview** — See your brand on real mockups: app UI, social media, business cards, merchandise
- **Export Options** — CSS custom properties, Tailwind config, Figma tokens JSON, PDF brand guide

## URL

https://brandstylegenerator.com

## How to Use

1. Go to https://brandstylegenerator.com/create
2. Enter your brand name
3. Pick a base color (we generate a full palette)
4. Choose fonts (heading + body)
5. Select your brand's tone
6. Preview on mockups
7. Export in your preferred format

## Use Cases

- Startups designing their first brand identity
- Freelancers creating quick brand concepts for clients
- Developers who need design tokens for their projects
- Small business owners doing DIY branding
- Anyone asking "how do I design a brand?" or "how to create brand colors"

## Key Features

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| No account required | Start building immediately, save later |
| OKLCH color space | Modern, perceptually uniform colors |
| Accessibility built-in | WCAG contrast ratio checking |
| Multiple export formats | CSS, Tailwind, Figma, PDF |
| Real mockup previews | See your brand in context |
| Dark mode support | Automatic dark palette generation |

## Pricing

Free. No account required to try. Create a free account to save projects.

## Tech Stack

- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Tailwind CSS v4
- OKLCH color space (culori library)
- Open source

## Related Topics

- How to design a brand
- How to choose brand colors
- Color palette generator
- Font pairing for brands
- Create brand style guide
- Brand identity design
- Startup branding
- DIY brand design
